tools.name: get_stories
tools.description: Get stories from Hacker News. The options are `top`, `new`, `ask_hn`, `show_hn` for types of stories. This doesn't include the comments. Use `get_story_info` to get the comments.

story_type.description: Type of stories to get, one of: `top`, `new`, `ask_hn`, `show_hn`

tools.name: get_user_info
tools.description: Get user info from Hacker News, including the stories they've submitted

num_stories.description: Number of stories to get, defaults to 10

tools.name: search_stories
tools.description: Search stories from Hacker News. It is generally recommended to use simpler queries to get a broader set of results (less than 5 words). Very targetted queries may not return any results.

search_by_date.description: Search by date, defaults to False. If this is False, then we search by relevance, then points, then number of comments.

num_results.description: Number of results to get, defaults to 10

tools.name: get_story_info
tools.description: Get detailed story info from Hacker News, including the comments

findings.title: Schema poisoning indicator
findings.description: input_schema: no required fields; empty input acceptable

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'story_type' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'user_name' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'query' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.description: input_schema: no required fields; empty input acceptable
